statement.en: Preventive caregiver-centered education to promote oral health in elementary school-aged children
statement.summary: The full abstract for this thesis is available in the body of the thesis, and will be available when the embargo expires.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a provisional thesis document (embargo status indicates unpublished/unvalidated work). The axiom proposes a caregiver-centered educational intervention for oral health promotion. Without access to the full abstract, methodology, or results, the claim cannot be evaluated against established evidence. It is in active research state, not yet peer-reviewed or validated.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 保護者の知識が早期に投下されるほど、その影響は無限に増幅される。
